title: Shirt
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|Keep your shirt on, Dracmus.|[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="Showdown at Centerpoint">''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]''</ref>}}
[[File:SullustanTourist-SWGTCG.png|thumb|right|A [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] wearing his lucky shirt.]]
A '''shirt''' was an item of clothing normally worn on the torso of a body. Early in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]-turned-[[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Toval Seyah]] took a trip from his position aboard [[Centerpoint Station]] to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to train [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] to destroy the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. In order to maintain the pretense that he had been on vacation, he wore a shirt typical of wealthy tourists upon his return. This shirt was made of [[Plastic/Legends|plastic]] and had embedded electronic circuitry which displayed bright and colorful designs which changed whenever the shirt was poked with sufficient force. The shirt also emitted a pleasant "boop" noise each time the pattern changed.<ref name="betrayalol">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]''</ref>

{{Clothes-stub}}
